summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 16 warning, 13 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:70` — Inconsistent exit strategy: config errors use `process.exit(1)` while happy-empty and lock-contention paths use `return`/`process.exit(0)`. Mixing forces test monkey-patching for some paths. Consider unifying.
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:53` — `process.cwd()` hardcoded rather than injected through `deps`. Could cause issues if invoked from a different working directory.

🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:115` — `setProjectItemStatus` return value unchecked on pre-dispatch, post-success, and post-failure transitions. Board could show stale state. Acceptable for v1 since the lock is the primary concurrency guard.
🟡 test/cron-tick.test.mjs:88 — Test name says "exits 0" but `exitCode` is never explicitly asserted; add `assert.equal(exitCode, null)` to make the exit-0 contract machine-verifiable
🟡 test/cron-tick.test.mjs:82 — No spy on `lockFile.release()` in the no-ready-items test; a refactor moving `return` outside `try/finally` would silently leak the lock with no test catching it
Both 🟡 findings are test-quality gaps (not production bugs) — they should go to backlog but don't block merge.
🟡 `handshake.json:7` — Claims "580 tests pass" but actual count is 546 (544 pass, 2 skipped)
🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:66` — "exits 0" test name but no explicit exit code assertion (carried forward from prior reviews)
🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:82` — No spy on `lockFile.release()` in no-ready-items path; lock leak wouldn't be caught by tests (carried forward)
🟡 test/cron-tick.test.mjs:85 — Test name claims "exits 0" but `exitCode` is never explicitly asserted; add `assert.equal(exitCode, null)` to machine-verify the exit-0 contract
🟡 test/cron-tick.test.mjs:82 — No spy on `lockFile.release()` — lock leak on the no-ready-items path would go undetected if `return` were refactored outside `try`/`finally`
🟡 test/cron-tick.test.mjs:75 — No test for truly empty board (`listProjectItems` returns `[]`); only tests board with non-Ready items

🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:110` — Title sanitization misses Unicode bidirectional/line separator chars (U+2028, U+2029, U+200E–U+200F, etc.) that could be used for prompt obfuscation when passed to the LLM agent. Extend the regex.
🟡 `bin/lib/cron.mjs:125` — Raw `err.message` posted to GitHub issue comments could leak internal paths or system details. Truncate and sanitize before posting.

🔴 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:6` — **Dead code**: `existsSync` is imported but never used anywhere in the test file. Single `grep` confirms only the import line references it. This was previously flagged by the task-1 eval as "resolved" (removed), but that claim is false — the import is still present.
- 🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:88` — Test claims "exits 0" but never asserts `exitCode === null`
- 🟡 `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:82` — No spy on `lock.release()` — refactor could silently break lock cleanup
